query:
SELECT id, section, entity, status, row_count, error_message, started_at, finished_at
FROM sync_logs
WHERE started_at >= '2026-05-07 16:00:00'
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
SELECT id, section, entity, status, row_count, error_message, started_at, finished_at
FROM sync_logs
WHERE started_at >= '2026-05-07 16:00:00'
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 20;
